title: CIRI is seeking nominations for the 2008 CIRI Shareholder of
summary: CIRI is seeking nominations for the 2008 CIRI Shareholder of the Year Award and AFN President’s Awards. Nominations must be submitted to CIRI by 5 p.m. on Friday, Sept. 19. CIRI’s Shareholder of the Year Award recognizes shareholders for exemplifying dedication to Alaska Native culture, heritage and...
